svg.title: Builderz World cohort overview
svg.desc: A vertical overview of the Builderz World cohort: three phases stacked, with Week 0 Threshold inside Phase I, then Identity, Signal, and Leverage.
svg.text: Week 0 sets the room. Weeks 1–8 move from identity to signal to leverage — each phase building on the last.
Find the patterns underneath your work. Name what people should recognize.
Orientation and setup before the cohort begins.
What if your genius is how you do the work?
"Here it is. This is who I am."
What should the market understand about you?
Turn identity into public signal. Use market response to sharpen it.
"I know how to earn attention on purpose."
How do I make this visible?
"I know how to turn attention into traction."
What is actually working, with whom, and why?
Use AI and proof to compound the work. Enter Builderz World with a verified arc.
"I know where AI makes me more effective."
"I am not leaving a course. I am entering a world."
What changed, and what now continues?
BUILDERZ WORLD — FROM IDENTITY TO SIGNAL TO LEVERAGE
